subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the Truth is verily the Preserved Tablet and the Hidden Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه هو اللوح المحفوظ و الکتاب المکنون
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for protection
